title: The team — Replication Radar
intro: Replication Radar is built in the open for the OpenAIRE AI Hackathon. It's a small, growing team — and contributors become part of it. Every person below is a single Markdown file in `site/bios/`; add a file and you appear here, in alphabetical order. See "Join the team" at the bottom.

contribute.heading: Join the team
contribute.body: Want to help? Open an issue to say hi, then add yourself with one small pull request — a single Markdown file in `site/bios/your-name.md`. A short YAML header (name, role, links, optional photo) on top of your bio in Markdown. That's the whole change — no list to edit, you appear automatically in alphabetical order.
contribute.example:
---
name: Your Name
role: Your role — e.g. Research Software Engineer
linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/...
github: https://github.com/...
orcid: https://orcid.org/0000-...
photo:        # optional: a URL or a filename in site/
---

One sentence: who you are and what you do.

- A highlight — e.g. wrote Nanopublications 101
- A project you maintain or a community you're part of
- Up to ~5 short bullets, written in **Markdown**
